todayRecommendation: Execute today's open water swim at La Jolla Shores as pure aerobic recovery — no intensity, just enjoy the ocean and flush yesterday's race effort. This closes out Week 11 with appropriate recovery before the final taper sharpening week.

keyInsight: The controlled 10K effort yesterday at 142 HR demonstrates excellent pacing discipline — applying the Oceanside lesson of conservative early racing to protect the run, now just 14 days from Oregon.
